codeReview.summary: Feature implementation satisfies inventory hardening scope: positive finished-goods recount adjustments are supported; raw-material adjustment API exists with idempotency and accounting posting; raw-material domain now rejects negative stock directly via business exception; and expiring-batches endpoint returns combined RM/FG data with deterministic ordering. Migration artifacts for raw material adjustment data model are present in both migration tracks and tests cover adjustment flows, idempotency, and stock constraints.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Task subagent model resolution remains a cross-milestone constraint that can block automated review fan-out and should be handled as a known validator fallback condition.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Repeated Task failures return the same invalid custom model alias error before any reviewer execution starts.

summary: PASS. Inventory safety/adjustment capabilities are implemented with required endpoints, guardrails, and accounting/idempotency behavior, and validated by focused tests plus gate-fast.
